tr.td: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
Inject 10 units (70/30 insulin) subcutaneously twice daily before breakfast and dinner
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs

ul.li: Achieve and maintain HbA1c within individualized target range to reduce risk of diabetes complications.
Maintain blood pressure within recommended range for patients with diabetes and kidney disease.
Reduce urinary albumin excretion to slow progression of diabetic kidney disease.
Achieve and maintain healthy weight to improve metabolic control and reduce cardiovascular risk.
Engage in regular physical activity as recommended for diabetes self-management.
Patient will receive education on lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, sodium reduction, weight management, alcohol moderation) to help control blood pressure.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional

ul.li: Achieve and maintain HbA1c within individualized target range to reduce risk of diabetes complications.
Maintain blood pressure within recommended range for patients with diabetes and kidney disease.
Reduce urinary albumin excretion to slow progression of diabetic kidney disease.
Achieve and maintain healthy weight to improve metabolic control and reduce cardiovascular risk.
Engage in regular physical activity as recommended for diabetes self-management.
Patient will receive education on lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, sodium reduction, weight management, alcohol moderation) to help control blood pressure.
